contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Diagrams.CommutativeSquares HSet.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Diagrams.CommutativeSquares HSet.

(** * Basic facts about fibrations *)

(* ** Homotopy fibers *)

(** Paths in homotopy fibers can be constructed using [path_sigma] and [transport_paths_Fl]. *)

goals.conclusion:
{q : x1.1 = x2.1 & x1.2 = ap f q @ x2.2} <~>
{p : x1.1 = x2.1 & transport (fun x : A => f x = y) p x1.2 = x2.2}

forall a : x1.1 = x2.1,
x1.2 = ap f a @ x2.2 <~> transport (fun x : A => f x = y) a x1.2 = x2.2
x1.2 = ap f p @ x2.2 <~> transport (fun x : A => f x = y) p x1.2 = x2.2
(ap f p)^ @ x1.2 = x2.2 <~> transport (fun x : A => f x = y) p x1.2 = x2.2

contents:
Definition path_hfiber {A B : Type} {f : A -> B} {y : B}
  {x1 x2 : hfiber f y} (q : x1.1 = x2.1) (r : x1.2 = ap f q @ x2.2)
  : x1 = x2
  := path_hfiber_uncurried (q;r).
(** If we rearrange this a bit, then it characterizes the fibers of [ap]. *)

goals.conclusion: hfiber (ap f) p <~> (x1; p) = (x2; 1)
hfiber (ap f) p <~> (x1; p) = (x2; 1)
{x : x1 = x2 & ap f x = p} <~> {q : x1 = x2 & p = ap f q @ 1}
ap f q = p <~> p = ap f q @ 1
p = ap f q <~> p = ap f q @ 1

contents:
Definition equiv_hfiber_homotopic
  {A B : Type} (f g : A -> B) (h : f == g) (b : B)
  : hfiber f b <~> hfiber g b.

goals.conclusion: hfiber f b <~> hfiber g b
hfiber f b <~> hfiber g b
IsEquiv (fun fx : {x : A & f x = b} => (fx.1; (h fx.1)^ @ fx.2))

contents:
refine (isequiv_adjointify _ (fun gx => (gx.1 ; (h gx.1) @ gx.2)) _ _);
    intros [a p]; simpl; apply ap.

goals.conclusion: (h a)^ @ (h a @ p) = p
h a @ ((h a)^ @ p) = p
(h a)^ @ (h a @ p) = p
h a @ ((h a)^ @ p) = p

contents: (** Commutative squares induce maps between fibers. *)

goals.conclusion: hfiber f b -> hfiber g (k b)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: hfiber f b -> hfiber g (k b)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: A -> C

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: forall a : A, (fun x : A => f x = b) a -> (fun x : C => g x = k b) (?f a)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: A -> C

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: forall a : A, (fun x : A => f x = b) a -> (fun x : C => g x = k b) (h a)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

contents: intros a e; exact ((p a)^ @ ap k e).
(** This doesn't need to be defined as an instance, since typeclass search can already find it, but we state it here for the reader's benefit. *)
(** A version of [functor_hfiber] which is functorial in both the function and the point *)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: A -> C

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: (fun x : C => g x = b') (h a)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h
(fun x : A => f x = b) a

contents: exact ((p a)^ @ ap k e @ q).

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (functor_hfiber2 p q)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (functor_hfiber2 p q)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (fun e : f a = b => ((p a)^ @ ap k e) @ q)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

contents: exact (isequiv_compose (fun e => (p a)^ @ ap k e) (fun e' => e' @ q)).

goals.conclusion:
forall x : X,
functor_hfiber (comm_square_comp' H K) x ==
functor_hfiber K (i x) o (functor_hfiber H x : hfiber f x -> hfiber g (i x))

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion:
forall x : X,
functor_hfiber (comm_square_comp' H K) x ==
functor_hfiber K (i x) o (functor_hfiber H x : hfiber f x -> hfiber g (i x))

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion:
functor_hfiber (comm_square_comp' H K) x (y; p) =
functor_hfiber K (i x) (functor_hfiber H x (y; p))

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion:
functor_hfiber (comm_square_comp' H K) (f y) (y; 1) =
functor_hfiber K (i (f y)) (functor_hfiber H (f y) (y; 1))

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun x : C => h x = j (i (f y))) 1
  ((comm_square_comp' H K (y; 1).1)^ @ ap (fun x : X => j (i x)) (y; 1).2) =
(K (functor_hfiber H (f y) (y; 1)).1)^ @
ap j (functor_hfiber H (f y) (y; 1)).2

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion:
(comm_square_comp' H K (y; 1).1)^ =
(K (functor_hfiber H (f y) (y; 1)).1)^ @
ap j (functor_hfiber H (f y) (y; 1)).2

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion: (ap j (H (y; 1).1))^ = ap j (functor_hfiber H (f y) (y; 1)).2

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion: (functor_hfiber H (f y) (y; 1)).2 = (H (y; 1).1)^

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion:
hfiber (functor_hfiber p b) (c; q) <~>
hfiber (functor_hfiber (fun x : A => (p x)^) c) (b; q^)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
hfiber (functor_hfiber p b) (c; q) <~>
hfiber (functor_hfiber (fun x : A => (p x)^) c) (b; q^)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
forall a : hfiber h c,
?Goal a <~> functor_hfiber (fun x : A => (p x)^) c a = (b; q^)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: {x : _ & ?Goal2 x} <~> {x : _ & ?Goal x}

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion: forall a : hfiber f b, ?Goal2 a <~> functor_hfiber p b a = (c; q)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
{a : hfiber f b &
{p0 : (functor_hfiber p b a).1 = (c; q).1 &
transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) p0 (functor_hfiber p b a).2 = (c; q).2}} <~>
{a : hfiber h c &
{p0 : (functor_hfiber (fun x : A => (p x)^) c a).1 = (b; q^).1 &
transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) p0
  (functor_hfiber (fun x : A => (p x)^) c a).2 =
(b; q^).2}}

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
{a : A &
{p0 : f a = b &
{p1 : (functor_hfiber p b (a; p0)).1 = (c; q).1 &
transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) p1 (functor_hfiber p b (a; p0)).2 =
(c; q).2}}} <~>
{a : A &
{p0 : h a = c &
{p1 : (functor_hfiber (fun x : A => (p x)^) c (a; p0)).1 = (b; q^).1 &
transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) p1
  (functor_hfiber (fun x : A => (p x)^) c (a; p0)).2 =
(b; q^).2}}}

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
{p0 : f a = b &
{p1 : h a = c & transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) p1 ((p a)^ @ ap k p0) = q}} <~>
{p0 : h a = c &
{p1 : f a = b &
transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) p1 (((p a)^)^ @ ap g p0) = q^}}

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
{p0 : f a = b &
{p1 : h a = c & transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) p1 ((p a)^ @ ap k p0) = q}} <~>
{a0 : f a = b &
{b0 : h a = c &
transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) a0 (((p a)^)^ @ ap g b0) = q^}}

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) a1 ((p a)^ @ ap k a0) = q <~>
transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) a0 (((p a)^)^ @ ap g a1) = q^

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) a1 ((p a)^ @ ap k a0) = q <~>
(transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) a0 (((p a)^)^ @ ap g a1))^ = (q^)^

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) a1 ((p a)^ @ ap k a0) = q <~>
(transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) a0 (((p a)^)^ @ ap g a1))^ = q

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

goals.conclusion:
(transport (fun x : B => k x = g c) a0 (((p a)^)^ @ ap g a1))^ =
transport (fun x : C => g x = k b) a1 ((p a)^ @ ap k a0)

hypotheses.type: k o f == g o h

contents: (** ** Replacing a map with a fibration *)

Definition equiv_fibration_replacement  {B C} (f:C ->B)
  : C <~> {y:B & hfiber f y}.

goals.conclusion: C <~> {y : B & hfiber f y}
C <~> {y : B & hfiber f y}

contents: (** This is a useful variant for taking a "double fiber" of two maps. *)

Definition equiv_double_fibration_replacement
  {X Y Z : Type} (f : X -> Y) (g : X -> Z)
  : X <~> {y : Y & {z : Z & {x : X & f x = y /\ g x = z}}}.

Definition hfiber_fibration {X} (x : X) (P:X->Type)
  : P x <~> @hfiber (sig P) X pr1 x.

goals.conclusion: P x <~> hfiber pr1 x
P x <~> hfiber pr1 x

contents: Context (n : trunc_index) {A B C : Type} (f : A -> B) (g : B -> C).

Definition hfiber_compose_map (c : C)
    : hfiber (g o f) c -> hfiber g c
    := fun x => (f x.1 ; x.2).

Definition hfiber_hfiber_compose_map (b : B)
    : hfiber (hfiber_compose_map (g b)) (b;1) <~> hfiber f b.

goals.conclusion: hfiber (hfiber_compose_map (g b)) (b; 1) <~> hfiber f b
hfiber (hfiber_compose_map (g b)) (b; 1) <~> hfiber f b

contents: (** Once we "destruct" the equality in a sigma type, the rest is just shuffling of data and path induction. *)

Definition hfiber_compose (c : C)
    : hfiber (g o f) c <~> { w : hfiber g c & hfiber f w.1 }.

goals.conclusion: hfiber (g o f) c <~> {w : hfiber g c & hfiber f w.1}
hfiber (g o f) c <~> {w : hfiber g c & hfiber f w.1}

contents:
#[export] Instance istruncmap_compose `{!IsTruncMap n g} `{!IsTruncMap n f}
    : IsTruncMap n (g o f).

goals.conclusion: IsTruncMap n (g o f)
IsTruncMap n (g o f)
IsTrunc n (hfiber (fun x : A => g (f x)) c)

contents: (** We characterize the fibers of [functor_forall], but only in the special case where the base map is [idmap]. This doesn't depend on anything else in this file, but can't be put in Types/Forall.v, because it requires results from Types/Sigma.v. *)

goals.conclusion: hfiber (functor_forall_id h) g <~> (forall a : A, hfiber (h a) (g a))

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, P a -> Q a

goals.conclusion: hfiber (functor_forall_id h) g <~> (forall a : A, hfiber (h a) (g a))

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, P a -> Q a

goals.conclusion:
{x : forall a : A, P a & (fun b : A => h b (x b)) = g} <~>
(forall a : A, {x : P a & h a x = g a})

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, P a -> Q a

goals.conclusion:
{x : forall a : A, P a & (fun b : A => h b (x b)) = g} <~>
{f : forall x : A, P x & forall x : A, h x (f x) = g x}

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, P a -> Q a

goals.conclusion: (fun b : A => h b (f b)) = g <~> (forall x : A, h x (f x) = g x)

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, P a -> Q a

contents:
Definition hfiber_const A {B} (y y' : B)
  : hfiber (fun _ : A => y) y' <~> A * (y = y')
  := equiv_sigma_prod0 A (y = y').

Instance istruncmap_ap {A B} n (f:A -> B) `{!IsTruncMap n.+1 f}
  : forall x y, IsTruncMap n (@ap _ _ f x y)
  := fun x x' y =>
       istrunc_equiv_istrunc _ (hfiber_ap y)^-1.

Definition istruncmap_from_ap {A B} n (f:A -> B) `{!forall x y, IsTruncMap n (@ap _ _ f x y)}
  : IsTruncMap n.+1 f.

goals.conclusion: IsTruncMap n.+1 f

hypotheses.type: forall x y : A, IsTruncMap n (ap f)

goals.conclusion: IsTruncMap n.+1 f

hypotheses.type: forall x y : A, IsTruncMap n (ap f)

goals.conclusion: forall x y0 : hfiber f y, IsTrunc n (x = y0)

hypotheses.type: forall x y0 : A, IsTruncMap n (ap f)

contents:
Definition equiv_istruncmap_ap `{Funext} {A B} n (f:A -> B)
  : IsTruncMap n.+1 f <~> (forall x y, IsTruncMap n (@ap _ _ f x y))
  := equiv_iff_hprop (@istruncmap_ap _ _ n f) (@istruncmap_from_ap _ _ n f).

Instance isequiv_ap_isembedding {A B} (f : A -> B) `{!IsEmbedding f}
  : forall x y, IsEquiv (@ap _ _ f x y).

goals.conclusion: forall x y : A, IsEquiv (ap f)
forall x y : A, IsEquiv (ap f)
IsEquiv (ap f)

contents:
Definition equiv_ap_isembedding {A B} (f : A -> B) `{!IsEmbedding f} (x y : A)
  : (x = y) <~> (f x = f y)
  := Build_Equiv _ _ (ap f) _.

Definition isembedding_isequiv_ap {A B} (f : A -> B) `{!forall x y, IsEquiv (@ap _ _ f x y)}
  : IsEmbedding f.

goals.conclusion: IsEmbedding f

hypotheses.type: forall x y : A, IsEquiv (ap f)

goals.conclusion: IsEmbedding f

hypotheses.type: forall x y : A, IsEquiv (ap f)

contents:
Definition equiv_isequiv_ap_isembedding `{Funext} {A B} (f : A -> B)
  : IsEmbedding f <~> (forall x y, IsEquiv (@ap _ _ f x y)).

goals.conclusion: IsEmbedding f <~> (forall x y : A, IsEquiv (ap f))
IsEmbedding f <~> (forall x y : A, IsEquiv (ap f))

contents: (** It follows from [isembedding_isequiv_ap] and [isequiv_ap_equiv_fun] that [equiv_fun] is an embedding. *)

Instance isembedding_equiv_fun `{Funext} {A B : Type}
  : IsEmbedding (@equiv_fun A B).

goals.conclusion: IsEmbedding equiv_fun
IsEmbedding equiv_fun

contents:
Lemma ap_isinj_embedding_beta {X Y : Type} (f : X -> Y) {I : IsEmbedding f} {x0 x1 : X}
  : forall (p : f x0 = f x1), ap f (isinj_embedding f I x0 x1 p) = p.

goals.conclusion: forall p : f x0 = f x1, ap f (isinj_embedding f I x0 x1 p) = p
forall p : f x0 = f x1, ap f (isinj_embedding f I x0 x1 p) = p

ap f (isinj_embedding f I x0 x1 (equiv_ap_isembedding f x0 x1 q)) =
equiv_ap_isembedding f x0 x1 q

ap f (isinj_embedding f I x0 x0 (equiv_ap_isembedding f x0 x0 1)) =
equiv_ap_isembedding f x0 x0 1
ap f (isinj_embedding f I x0 x0 1) = 1
